title: Under-Desk Cable Tray Setup
description: Clean cable management for a dual monitor desk. Under-desk tray velcro ties and a single power strip mounted out of sight. #cablemanagement #desksetup #battlestation
alt_text: Underside of a desk showing a metal cable tray with neatly routed cables and a hidden power strip

title: Single Monitor Arm Clamp Mount
description: Freeing up desk space with a clamp-on monitor arm. Frees the area under the display for the keyboard and notebook. #monitorarm #desksetup #ergonomic
alt_text: A 27 inch monitor floating on a black articulating arm above a clean wooden desk

title: Warm Bias Lighting Behind Monitor
description: LED bias lighting strip behind the monitor reduces eye strain during late debugging sessions. Warm 2700K looks great on camera too. #biaslighting #desksetup #ledstrip
alt_text: A monitor on a dark desk glowing with warm amber LED light behind it in a dim room

title: Minimal Wood Desk with Hidden Cables
description: Solid wood desk top with all cables routed through a grommet and down the rear leg. Inspiration for the studio battlestation. #battlestation #cablemanagement #minimaldesk
alt_text: A minimalist walnut desk with a single monitor mechanical keyboard and no visible cables

title: Dual Monitor Stacked Arm Layout
description: Vertical stacked dual monitor arm for code on the bottom and docs or chat on top. Saves desk depth in a small studio. #dualmonitor #monitorarm #desksetup
alt_text: Two monitors stacked vertically on a single dual arm above a desk with a laptop on a stand

title: Desk Lamp Plus Monitor Light Bar
description: Combining a screen-mounted light bar with a small task lamp for even lighting on the keyboard at night. No glare on the display. #desklighting #lightbar #homeoffice
alt_text: A monitor light bar clipped to the top of a screen casting soft light over a keyboard

title: Vertical Storage for a Studio Apartment
description: Floor-to-ceiling shelving to make use of vertical space in a 5th floor studio. Books gear and a few plants without crowding the floor. #smallspace #studioapartment #storage
alt_text: A tall white open shelving unit against a wall filled with books a plant and storage boxes

title: Studio Zoning with a Room Divider
description: Using a low shelf as a divider to separate the sleep area from the desk in an open studio. Keeps the work zone out of view from the bed. #studioapartment #smallspace #roomdivider
alt_text: A studio apartment with a low bookshelf dividing the bed area from a small desk workspace

title: Under-Bed Storage Drawers
description: Rolling under-bed drawers to stash gear cables and seasonal stuff in a small apartment. Frees up the closet. #smallspace #storagehacks #studioapartment
alt_text: Two flat rolling storage drawers being slid out from under a low platform bed

title: Warm Minimalist Studio Layout
description: Neutral palette with warm wood tones for a calm minimalist studio. A good reference for the Capitol Hill apartment refresh. #minimalist #studioapartment #interiordesign
alt_text: A bright minimalist studio apartment with light wood furniture neutral linens and a single plant

title: GMK Olive Keycap Set on a 65 Percent
description: Muted olive and cream keycaps on a 65 percent board. Considering this colorway for the next build to match the wood desk. #mechanicalkeyboard #keycaps #65percent
alt_text: A compact 65 percent mechanical keyboard with olive green and cream keycaps on a wooden desk

title: Tape Mod and Lube for Linear Switches
description: The tape mod plus hand-lubing linear switches for a deeper sound. Step by step before assembling the new build. #mechanicalkeyboard #switchmod #keebmods
alt_text: A keyboard PCB with painters tape applied to the back next to a tray of lubed switches

title: Pastel Keycap Set for a Clean Build
description: Soft pastel keycap set with a clean legend. Pairs well with a white aluminum case for a bright desk. #keycaps #mechanicalkeyboard #keebs
alt_text: A white keyboard with pastel pink blue and lavender keycaps photographed from above

title: Foam and PE Mod for a 75 Percent Case
description: Adding case foam and a PE foam sheet to a 75 percent build to remove ping and tighten the sound. Reference for the gasket-mount kit. #keebmods #mechanicalkeyboard #75percent
alt_text: An open 75 percent keyboard case with foam layers placed inside before the PCB is installed

title: Rattlesnake Ledge Early Morning Hike
description: Beating the crowds at Rattlesnake Ledge with a sunrise start. Short steep climb with a big payoff over the reservoir. #cascades #rattlesnakeledge #dayhike
alt_text: A rocky ledge overlooking Rattlesnake Lake and forested hills under early morning light

title: Mount Si Full Trail Guide
description: The classic Mount Si grind. Four miles up with switchbacks and a viewpoint at the Haystack. Good conditioning hike before bigger Cascades days. #mountsi #cascades #hiking
alt_text: A forested switchback trail climbing through tall evergreens on Mount Si

title: Day Hike Packing Checklist
description: The ten essentials trimmed down for short Cascades day hikes. Water layers headlamp snacks and a small first aid kit. #hiking #tenessentials #dayhike
alt_text: Hiking gear laid out flat including a daypack water bottle headlamp and snacks

title: 15 Minute Chicken Stir-Fry
description: Fast weeknight chicken and vegetable stir-fry with a soy garlic ginger sauce. Cooks in one pan in about 15 minutes. #stirfry #weeknightdinner #quickmeals
alt_text: A wok of chicken stir-fry with bell peppers broccoli and a glossy soy sauce over rice

title: Teriyaki Salmon Rice Bowl
description: A simple teriyaki salmon rice bowl with edamame cucumber and sesame. Meal-preps well for busy weeks. #ricebowl #salmon #mealprep
alt_text: A rice bowl topped with glazed teriyaki salmon edamame sliced cucumber and sesame seeds

title: Tofu and Veggie Stir-Fry Sauce
description: A go-to stir-fry sauce that works with tofu or chicken. Soy sauce rice vinegar honey garlic and a cornstarch slurry. #stirfry #tofu #saucerecipe
alt_text: Crispy tofu and vegetables in a glossy brown stir-fry sauce in a cast iron pan

title: Standing Desk Layout for a Small Room
description: Sit-stand desk pushed into a corner with a monitor arm to reclaim floor space. Planning the work-from-home corner for on-call days. #standingdesk #homeoffice #smallspace
alt_text: A standing desk raised to standing height in a corner with a single monitor on an arm

title: Ergonomic Home Office Chair and Footrest
description: Ergonomic chair height monitor at eye level and a footrest to keep posture in check during long debugging sessions. #homeoffice #ergonomics #wfh
alt_text: An ergonomic mesh office chair at a desk with a monitor at eye level and a footrest below
